title: Dego Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Compromised keys leading to large token theft across multiple chains

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of tokens from a single address to another within a short timeframe

vulnerable_contracts: LP tokens on BSC and ETH
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of tokens from a single address to another within a short timeframe
summary: Dego Finance suffered a large token theft due to compromised keys. Attackers transferred large amounts of tokens and manipulated the price of DEGO. A guard could have detected and blocked suspicious token transfers.
